experiment-designer.name: experiment-designer
experiment-designer.description: Designs and runs empirical experiments to test theoretical predictions. The orchestrator launches this agent at Stage 4 (Experiment Design & Execution) after implications are derived. Uses gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b via llm_client.py.

experiment-reviewer.name: experiment-reviewer
experiment-reviewer.description: Reviews experiment design, methodology, and results. The orchestrator launches this agent after experiments are run to verify methodology and assess whether results support the theory.
